---
title: "Blog about Latex"
listing:
    id: id_Blog2
    contents: "Blogs2/b*/*.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date"
    max-items: 15
    image-align: left
    image-placeholder: "Figures/noFigureMessage.jpg"
    date-format: long
    categories: true
    sort-ui: [title, date]
---
Still working ...

::: {#id_Blog2}
:::
